title: Upcycling An Old Wine Bottle To A Lamp
description:
This is using one of our kits - the lamp kit which can be found here http://secure.workingink.co.uk/shop/working-ink-kits/touch-light-kit/to upscale an old wine bottle and  broken venetian blind. To learn how to cut the bottle using our ink here is the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RrUd6VIjkuk
the music was provided royalty free from bensound he can be found at www.bensound.com
